description: Address semantic review issues: (1) Add notifee event handler to navigate to alert screens on notification tap, (2) Fix stale closure in packing alert countdown with handledRef guard, (3) Extract shared routeIncomingMessage function to eliminate duplicated FCM switch-case logic.
steps: In apps/mobile-staff/src/services/fcm.ts: Extract a shared async function routeIncomingMessage(message) that contains the switch-case logic. Call it from both handleForegroundMessage and setBackgroundMessageHandler.

In apps/mobile-staff/app/alert/packing/[eventId].tsx: Add a handledRef = useRef(false) and guard both handleAccept and handleReject with early return if handledRef.current is true, setting it true before proceeding.

In apps/mobile-staff/app/_layout.tsx: Import notifee and EventType from @notifee/react-native. Add a useEffect that registers notifee.onForegroundEvent() listener. On EventType.PRESS or EventType.ACTION_PRESS, check notification.data.type and router.push to the appropriate alert screen.
acceptance_criteria: fcm.ts has a single routeIncomingMessage function used by both foreground and background handlers
packing alert screen guards against double-action with a useRef
_layout.tsx registers a notifee onForegroundEvent listener that routes to alert screens based on notification data type
verification: TypeScript compilation passes for modified files
